rulings.Case Title: ANGIE AQUINO VS. MICHAEL MELKONIAN et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Imposing Terminating Sanctions As To Deft'S ; Request Fo Monetary Sanctions
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Tuesday, November 2, 2010, line 1, PLAINTIFF ANGIE AQUINO'S Motion For Imposing Terminating Sanctions As To Defendant's Request For Monetary Sanctions. GRANTED, NO OPPOSITION FILED. THE COURT STIRKES THE ANSWER OF DEFENDANTS ADELAIDE ALTMAN, ROBERT ALTMAN AND REAL ESTATE LIMITED. DEFAULT TO BE ENTERED IN PLAINTIFF'S FAVOR. PLAINTIFF TO OBTAIN $1,040.00 IN MONETARY SANCTIONS PAYABLE WITHIN 30 DAYS OF NOTICE OF THIS ORDER. =(302/CWW)

rulings.Calendar Matter: Mtn For Order Imposing Terminating Sanctions And Monetary Sanctions
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Tuesday, November 2, 2010, line 2, PLAINTIFF ILYA SARKISKYAN'S Motion For Order Imposing Terminating Sanctions And Monetary Sanctions.
